tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsLocationsInstancesInventoriesList
tools.description: List inventory data for all VM instances in the specified zone.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsLocationsInstancesOsPolicyAssignmentsReportsList
tools.description: List OS policy asssignment reports for all Compute Engine VM instances in the specified zone.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsLocationsInstancesVulnerabilityReportsList
tools.description: List vulnerability reports for all VM instances in the specified zone.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsLocationsOsPolicyAssignmentsCreate
tools.description: Create an OS policy assignment. This method also creates the first revision of the OS policy assignment. This method returns a long running operation (LRO) that contains the rollout details. The rollout can be cancelled by cancelling the LRO. For more information, see [Method: projects.locations.osPolicyAssignments.operations.cancel](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/osconfig/rest/v1/projects.locations.osPolicyAssignments.operations/cancel).

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsLocationsOsPolicyAssignmentsList
tools.description: List the OS policy assignments under the parent resource. For each OS policy assignment, the latest revision is returned.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsLocationsOsPolicyAssignmentsListRevisions
tools.description: List the OS policy assignment revisions for a given OS policy assignment.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchDeploymentsCreate
tools.description: Create an OS Config patch deployment.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchDeploymentsDelete
tools.description: Delete an OS Config patch deployment.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchDeploymentsList
tools.description: Get a page of OS Config patch deployments.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchDeploymentsPatch
tools.description: Update an OS Config patch deployment.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchDeploymentsPause
tools.description: Change state of patch deployment to "PAUSED". Patch deployment in paused state doesn't generate patch jobs.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchDeploymentsResume
tools.description: Change state of patch deployment back to "ACTIVE". Patch deployment in active state continues to generate patch jobs.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchJobsCancel
tools.description: Cancel a patch job. The patch job must be active. Canceled patch jobs cannot be restarted.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchJobsExecute
tools.description: Patch VM instances by creating and running a patch job.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchJobsGet
tools.description: Get the patch job. This can be used to track the progress of an ongoing patch job or review the details of completed jobs.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchJobsInstanceDetailsList
tools.description: Get a list of instance details for a given patch job.

tools.name: projects.osconfigProjectsPatchJobsList
tools.description: Get a list of patch jobs.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
